overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza and covered walkways at dusk. The scene features heavy cyberpunk aesthetics with colorful LED advertisements, holographic displays, and pedestrians in a commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with outdoor seating and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the narrow corridor between buildings, passing outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking in same direction

entered.detail: tall building with bright purple and pink neon signage including DATA IN text
large curved blue architectural structure with white canopy
row of benches with people sitting along the right side
tall vertical digital billboard displaying purple advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide commercial plaza with a prominent purple neon building on the right and a blue curved structure on the left. Pedestrians walk through the space while others sit on outdoor benches. The camera moves forward toward a narrowing corridor between tall buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: entering narrow corridor between tall buildings from open plaza
blood stains visible on the concrete ground in the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow corridor passing other pedestrians, navigating around blood stains on the ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and shorts walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: tall dark glass building facade on the right side of the corridor
large rectangular concrete planter with greenery

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor between high-rise buildings with artificial lighting. The large vertical billboard remains visible on the left while a dark glass facade rises on the right. Blood stains appear on the concrete ground as the camera continues walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated ceiling panels

events.description: colorful LED ceiling panels begin illuminating with green and pink lights
ceiling panels shift to orange and red colors cycling overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway with colorful overhead lighting, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: overhead structure with square panels cycling through green, pink, blue, and orange colors
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements including Splishil Machistar

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a covered walkway featuring a striking illuminated ceiling with panels cycling through vibrant colors. Digital advertisements appear on the right side while the glass facade building shifts to the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching pedestrian bridge with holographic displays

events.description: large holographic advertisement of a woman's face appears on the right wall
approaching the open pedestrian bridge structure at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching the pedestrian bridge while passing the large holographic face advertisement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the bridge structure ahead

entered.detail: large holographic projection of a woman's face with purple hair and glowing elements
elevated pedestrian bridge with archway and glass panels visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a prominent holographic face advertisement on the right as the camera approaches a pedestrian bridge structure. The colorful ceiling panels shift to the left side while the corridor opens toward the bridge ahead, maintaining the cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit commercial plaza into a series of increasingly enclosed and vibrant cyberpunk corridors. It begins in an open square flanked by purple and blue architectural structures where pedestrians linger on benches, before the camera moves forward into a narrowing gap between towering buildings. As the space tightens into a dim corridor, the open plaza gives way to a dark glass facade and blood-stained concrete, while a large vertical billboard looms on the left. The scene then opens into a covered walkway where the atmosphere intensifies with a ceiling of cycling colorful panels and flashing digital advertisements. Finally, the path leads toward a pedestrian bridge as a massive holographic face appears on the right, with the vibrant artificial lighting guiding the camera toward the structure ahead.
